name: Polymarket
facts: Leading prediction market platform with deep CLOB orderbooks
Part of the $13B monthly prediction market volume ecosystem
LEVER Protocol uses Polymarket CLOB Midpoint API as primary oracle source
Gamma API (Polymarket fallback) returned 0.0 for all markets during testing -- broken as backup
CLOB Orderbook midpoint returned static 0.5 due to empty books on low-volume markets
Offers spot (1x) exposure only -- no leverage infrastructure
Has WebSocket endpoints (wss://clob.polymarket.com/ws) but authentication not yet confirmed
